priority_ordering.note: Heuristic split based on arrival gap, not confirmed via proxy dispatch timestamps. 'likely_idle_pickup' = low-priority client arrived >1.0s before the high-priority client (probably picked up an idle slot correctly). 'likely_genuine' = arrival gap was small or unknown — same failure mode as a simultaneous-arrival violation.

batch_starvation.note: max_ttft is an upper bound on wait time (includes compute, not just queueing). worsening_flag fires if the back-half mean of per-wave max TTFT exceeds 1.5x the front-half mean — a rough signal only, not a formal starvation proof.
